title: ASIC home cover comparator visited less than 25 times a day
full_text:
Press space to play

Try:

Checking the network cables, modem and router
Reconnecting to Wi-Fi
ERR_INTERNET_DISCONNECTED
summary: The Australian Securities and Investments Commission (ASIC) has found that its home insurance comparison tool is rarely used, with less than 25 visits per day. This low traffic raises concerns about its effectiveness in helping consumers compare home insurance options.
heading: Regulation
key_points: ASIC's home insurance comparator tool is underused.
It receives fewer than 25 visits daily.
The low usage questions the tool's effectiveness.
ticker_line: ASIC's home insurance tool sees low usage
